creator: tagattie@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Daniel Tihanyi from comment #3)

I may have been a big vague when asking you to make a diff file.

I would like it to be a diff between rundeck2 and rundeck3 in the same sysutils/rundeck directory. Can you update the diff again?

Regarding maintainer, let's ask Volodymyr.

Volodymyr, do you feel comfortable about being the maintainer of the new sysutils/rundeck3, which is proposed by Daniel? If not, I will pass maintainership to Daniel.
